text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff… I can't… I should stop here…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I… I love it so much… 
It's calling me back already…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
…Okay, a short break, and then one 
more lap. That shouldn't count as 
overworking myself… right?
